items.eventName: Lagos Biennial 2026 · The Museum of Things Unseen
items.description: Fifth edition. Curators Chinyere Obieze, Furen Dai, Sam Hopkins. Rarely or never-exhibited works. The Àkéte Collection opens in Ikoyi in October — Africa's first public international contemporary art museum, designed by Tosin Oshinowo.

items.eventName: Brush Tu · Handle with Care · Evolution of a Collective
items.description: Three artists started Brush Tu in a house in Buru-Buru in 2013. No donor support. No sign outside. Twelve members now. Closes Saturday 29 May — seven days left.
items.credit: Installation view · Courtesy Circle Art Agency, Nairobi

items.venue: Kempinski Hotel Gold Coast + Galleria Mall
items.description: Founded on Ghanaian Independence Day 2016 — the date was a choice. West African contemporary and diaspora artists. London outpost opened 2020. Open Tuesday to Saturday, 11am–7pm. Free entry.

items.eventName: TAAT · The African Arts Trust · Nairobi
items.description: A gallery and a funding body. Grants for emerging artists and art organisations across 25+ African countries, from a single Nairobi base. Saturday hours 12pm–5pm.
items.credit: Installation view · April Kamunde · Fabric of Our Being · Courtesy TAAT

items.eventName: El Anatsui · Behind the Red Moon · Hyundai Commission
items.description: Thousands of metal bottle tops, sourced in Nigeria, woven into the largest indoor work the artist has made. Built on histories of trade routes that go back further than anyone wants to say plainly.
items.credit: Photo: Joe Humphrys · Courtesy the artist and Tate

items.description: South Africa's longest-running contemporary art fair. Coverage from the floor with our correspondent Khethiwe Tracy Gumede — returning after the 2025 edition.
items.credit: Photo: Khethiwe Tracy Gumede · FNB Art Joburg 2025, 18th edition · Courtesy ArtempireMJ

items.eventName: Investec Cape Town Art Fair 2026 · Listen
items.description: The 13th edition, themed Listen. Our correspondent Khethiwe Tracy Gumede was on the floor for VIP opening — full coverage in Spotlight.
items.credit: Photo: Khethiwe Tracy Gumede · Investec Cape Town Art Fair 2026 VIP Opening · Courtesy ArtempireMJ

items.description: The 14th edition. Press accreditation requested. Returning with our correspondent on the floor.
items.credit: Photo: Courtesy Investec Cape Town Art Fair · Press Pack 2026
